story.title: Survey omp's architecture and public surface
story.description: Building on docs/omp-research-scope.md (which fixes the target as Oh My Posh / oh-my-posh), produce a concise architecture map of OMP that the CC Review Orchestrator plugin can learn from. The map must list (a) workflow stages of OMP's prompt-rendering pipeline, (b) configuration precedence rules across flag / env / built-in default, (c) command-line / subcommand entry points and notable flags, (d) extension points (segments, templates, themes), and (e) observability/logging surfaces (debug subcommand, strict mode, cache). Deliverable is a single doc, ≤500 words of body prose (front-matter/headings/lists do not count). No source code, no test changes.

project_file_index.role: New deliverable. Concise architecture map covering five required sections: workflow stages, configuration precedence, CLI/flags, extension points, observability/logging. Body prose ≤500 words. Must reference Oh My Posh (consistent with docs/omp-research-scope.md) and stay vendor-neutral on whether each lesson should be adopted by CC Review.
READ-ONLY context for this story. Defines the target ('Oh My Posh') and the comparison areas; this survey must stay inside those boundaries and must not silently re-point to a different 'omp'.
READ-ONLY. Not edited. Referenced only to keep symbol names accurate when the survey notes CC-Review-side analogues.

definition_of_done.description: docs/omp-architecture-survey.md exists and contains all five required sections: workflow stages, configuration precedence, CLI/flags, extension points, observability/logging.
edge_cases: All five section headings present (case-insensitive match on the key noun).
File is not empty and not a stub.
definition_of_done.verify_command: test -f docs/omp-architecture-survey.md && for k in workflow precedence cli extension 'observab|logging'; do grep -qiE "$k" docs/omp-architecture-survey.md || { echo "missing section keyword: $k"; exit 1; }; done && echo ok

definition_of_done.description: Body prose of docs/omp-architecture-survey.md is ≤500 words (excluding ATX headings, fenced code blocks, and pure list-marker tokens — counted via a deterministic word count on lines that are neither blank, heading, nor fence).
edge_cases: Empty file fails (word count 0 should not happen — file must be non-trivial).
Counted words is between 50 and 500 inclusive.
Fenced code blocks (``` … ```) excluded from the count.
definition_of_done.verify_command: awk 'BEGIN{infence=0; n=0} /^```/{infence=!infence; next} { if (infence) next; if ($0 ~ /^#/) next; for (i=1;i<=NF;i++){ w=$i; gsub(/[`*_>\-]/,"",w); if (w ~ /[A-Za-z0-9]/) n++ } } END{ if (n<50||n>500){ print "word count out of range: " n; exit 1 } else { print "ok: " n " words" } }' docs/omp-architecture-survey.md

definition_of_done.description: Target named in this survey matches the target fixed by docs/omp-research-scope.md (Oh My Posh). Survey must not silently re-scope to a different 'omp'.
edge_cases: Survey mentions 'Oh My Posh' or 'oh-my-posh' at least once.

definition_of_done.description: No source code or test files are modified by this story. Only docs/omp-architecture-survey.md (new) and sprint-contract.json (this contract) may change.
definition_of_done.verify_command: test -f .pi/extensions/cc-review.ts && test -f tests/cc-review-behavior.test.ts && test -f tests/cc-review-static.test.mjs && test -f docs/omp-research-scope.md && echo ok
